meaning: adj.蜊壼｣ｫ蜑咲噪 (謖勤判隸ｻ蜊壼｣ｫ蟄ｦ菴肴婾莉惹ｺ句忽螢ｫ蜑榊ｷ･菴懃噪)
examples: The hope is that it will become a widespread predoctoral program.
The hope is that it will become a widespread predoctoral program in which at the postdoctoral level you get one year of scholarship with scholars from all around the world.
